summary: Fall back to SPOTIFY_SECRET when SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET is unset on `login --client-secret`.
reason: Both var names are commonly used in users' .env files; the docs call the credential 'Client Secret'. Carried forward from fix-auth-loopback-and-dry-run — the rest of that patch (127.0.0.1 loopback, PKCE, verify short-circuit) is machine-owned as of printing-press 4.27+ (mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#3457).
validated_outcome: login resolves the secret from either env var; PKCE URL emitted only when neither is set.
